description: An operator at a hydroelectric dam detects a drop in efficiency and suspects that the trash racks (which filter debris) are clogged.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the pressure differential across the trash racks.

expected_outcome.expected: System is monitoring the head loss across the racks.

nodes.task_description: The system detects an increase in the pressure drop, indicating a blockage.

expected_outcome.expected: System generates an alert for a clogged trash rack.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a crew to operate the automated trash rake to clean the racks.

expected_outcome.expected: Operator sends a command to start the cleaning cycle.
